description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, painted in a vibrant blue with white trim. The structure features multiple large windows along the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light. The backyard includes a swimming pool with a paved deck, a trampoline, a swing set, and two trees providing shade. The roof is flat and appears to be constructed from concrete or a similar material. The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, flanked by windows. The surrounding outdoor area is landscaped with a mix of hardscape and greenery, creating a family-friendly environment.
description: A blue, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool, trampoline, swing set, and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the full extent of the blue facade, with the backyard amenities visible behind.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the pool, paved deck, trampoline, swing set, and trees, with the side of the bungalow visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool area, backyard features, and the back wall of the bungalow with additional windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and partial front of the bungalow, with the pool, swing set, and trampoline in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
